overview: A full-stack Patient Appointment Booking System with premium dark glassmorphism UI, role-based access for patients and admins, interactive calendar booking, doctor management, and smooth Framer Motion animations throughout.
features: Patient and admin authentication with role-based access
Doctor listing with real-time search and filter by specialization
Interactive calendar with animated time slot selection
Book, reschedule, and cancel appointments with confirmation modals
Admin dashboard with system-wide appointment and doctor management
Premium dark glassmorphism theme with neon glow accents
Framer Motion page transitions and micro-interactions
